attacking_style: Decisive attacks with under 3km to go on short, punchy climbs. Explosive power suited to steep finishes rather than extended climbing efforts.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Short, steep punchy climbs like Fossa Brone. Capable of holding off pursuers in headwind sprint finishes after attacking on gradient.
vulnerability: Crash-prone in technical finales (crashed twice in final 20km). Unknown performance on longer climbs or high-altitude efforts.
key_patterns: Exceptional resilience and power retention after crashes in race-critical moments
Late-race attacks inside 3km on steep gradient finishes
Able to sustain power in headwind sprint after explosive climb attack
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation insufficient to determine trajectory despite impressive win
